metadata.title: Slotix — Intelligent Booking Platform
metadata.description: End scheduling chaos. Automate growth with the intelligent booking layer for modern service businesses.

hero.title: End scheduling chaos.
hero.subtitle: The intelligent booking layer for modern service businesses. Solo or team, fixed or dynamic — Slotix aligns client demand with your optimal availability, entirely frictionless.
hero.noCard: NO CREDIT CARD REQUIRED • PUBLIC BOOKING PAGE INCLUDED

features.title: Built for how you actually work
features.subtitle: Every feature designed to eliminate friction between your availability and client demand.

slots.title: Intelligent Slot Algorithms
slots.description: Choose between strict fixed intervals or let our dynamic engine optimize gaps to maximize your daily yield and prevent fragmented schedules.

booking.title: Zero-Login Booking
booking.description: Conversion drops when clients have to create accounts. Slotix public pages require zero registration. Select, confirm, done.

team.title: Solo or Team Scaling
team.description: Operate as a lone wolf or manage a multi-staff studio. Route bookings based on individual specialist availability and skill set.

schedule.title: Flexible Schedule Control
schedule.description: Set custom work hours for each day, add day-off overrides for vacations or sick days, and let Slotix automatically block unavailable time across all booking pages.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs.

cta.title: Ready to end scheduling chaos?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of service businesses that automate their bookings with Slotix. Set up in under 5 minutes.

orgCreator.paywallDescription: Subscribe to the Org Creator plan to create and manage organizations.

orgDeactivated.description: To manage organizations, go to the pricing plans and subscribe.

modeDescriptions.fixed: Even grid from start to end of work day
modeDescriptions.optimal: Grid + extra slots right after bookings
modeDescriptions.dynamic: After last booking, slots shift forward
